prestazioni: Replace the original 2.6L Lagonda LB6 inline-6 engine (engine code: LB6) with a fully built 3.0L LB6 stroker kit featuring forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm bore, 83mm stroke), Cunningham con-rods, and a billet crankshaft from RND Engineering, paired with a custom camshaft profile by Kent Cams (280° duration, 0.450" lift) for high-RPM power delivery (target: 220+ HP at 6,200 RPM).

Install a bespoke Weber 48 IDA carburetor setup with velocity stacks, custom jetting (primary: 145, secondary: 155), and a Mallory Unilite distributor for precise ignition timing, paired with a custom 3-into-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Hayward & Scott, terminating in a 2.5" dual-exit system with MagnaFlow 14815 mufflers for aggressive but period-correct tone.

Upgrade the front suspension with a custom-fabricated double-wishbone setup using Öhlins DFV road & track coilovers (250lb/in front, 200lb/in rear), poly-bushed with SuperPro SPF0115K components, and reinforced with a Whiteline KCA396 anti-roll bar (24mm front, 18mm rear) to eliminate body roll during high-speed cornering on vintage circuits like Goodwood.
estetica: Replace the factory aluminum body panels with hand-formed 1.2mm 5251 aluminum panels by RS Panels, featuring a custom louvered hood (12 rows, 3mm spacing) and rear fender flares (2" wider than stock) to accommodate wider 16x7" Minilite magnesium wheels (ET15 offset) wrapped in Avon CR6ZZ tires (185/60R16 front, 205/60R16 rear).

Install a period-correct but upgraded interior with a full leather retrim by Royal Steering Wheels (Connolly Vaumol hide, diamond stitching), a custom MOMO Prototipo 380mm steering wheel (quick-release hub), and a Smiths Chronometric tachometer (0-8,000 RPM) with a matching speedometer (0-160 MPH) in a bespoke aluminum dashboard by JME Motorsport.

Apply a custom paint scheme in Aston Martin Racing Green (BS381C-224) with hand-painted gold pinstriping (1.5mm width) by Classic Car Restorations, paired with a custom front splitter (carbon fiber, 3" overhang) and a rear ducktail spoiler (aluminum, 4" height) by Fibreworks GT for aerodynamic balance at speeds over 120 MPH.
